opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Destroyed rental couch → like-new for $52 — landlord can't tell the difference
opportunities.before_state: Stained, pet-hair-covered couch that looks embarrassing on camera; renters afraid to have guests over
opportunities.after_state: Clean, fitted, modern-looking sofa that photographs like a styled set — fur-free and waterproof
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's rental-upgrade content is surging this week and summer shedding season drives peak pet-hair complaints, making couch cover searches spike in June.

opportunities.specific_product: Brightech Ambience Pro waterproof outdoor string lights
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dead backyard → summer entertaining space for $36 — one strand changes everything
opportunities.before_state: Dark, empty patio or deck with no ambiance; looks like a neglected storage area after sunset
opportunities.after_state: Warm-glowing outdoor room perfect for July 4th and all-summer entertaining; looks like a restaurant patio
opportunities.why_now: BHG explicitly pinned Amazon outdoor lighting picks this week, HGTV has multiple Fourth of July outdoor entertaining pins, and July 4th is 26 days away — peak buying window opens today.

opportunities.specific_product: Patriotic tiered tray decor bundle with stars, mini flags, and wood beads
opportunities.transformation_hook: Plain kitchen counter → July 4th-ready Americana vignette for $34
opportunities.before_state: Bare kitchen counter or mantle with nothing seasonal — looks undecorated and flat on camera
opportunities.after_state: Styled Americana tiered tray with red/white/blue accents — shareable, festive, shoppable flat-lay content
buyer_intent_keywords: fourth of july home decor amazon
opportunities.why_now: HGTV published four separate Americana/Fourth of July decor pins this week and the purchase window for July 4th decorating peaks in the first two weeks of June — urgency is real.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 4-piece outdoor sectional with cushions
opportunities.transformation_hook: Concrete slab backyard → outdoor living room for $289 — summer hosting unlocked
opportunities.before_state: Empty or mismatched patio with a lone lawn chair; unusable for entertaining and ignored all summer
opportunities.after_state: Matched sectional seating area with cushions — full outdoor room that mirrors interior comfort and style
opportunities.why_now: Heat advisory signals active outdoor living nationwide, HGTV and BHG are both pushing outdoor entertaining content this week, and Best Choice Products carries a 15% commission on a higher AOV item.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Builder-grade kitchen cabinets → designer look for $28 — screwdriver only
opportunities.before_state: Dull chrome or black bar pulls on dated cabinets — entire kitchen looks 2009 and unloved
opportunities.after_state: Brushed gold hardware that reads high-end and modern on camera; transforms the whole kitchen in under an hour
buyer_intent_keywords: kitchen cabinet knob swap before after
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's rental-upgrade content this week specifically highlighted a hardware swap as the renter's proudest DIY, driving a wave of searches for renter-safe kitchen upgrades.
